---
title: "Glossary"
short-title: "Glossary"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Key terms and definitions used throughout this book."
keywords: ["glossary", "definitions", "terminology"]
---

# Glossary {#sec-glossary}

::: {.callout-note}
The glossary will be populated as chapters are completed.
:::
